# PHIL.011 ? Atomism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** atomism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Reality composed of indivisible atoms and void; mechanical causation; no teleology; materialist ontology; emergent properties

## Application
Explain phenomena through material composition and motion; avoid purpose-based explanations; reduce complex to simple elements; mechanical interactions

## Key Values
- Material composition
- Mechanical causation
- Reductionism
- No final causes

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, atomism
